positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mythical, glowing bioluminescent forest spirit, characterized by flowing ethereal drapery and delicate vine formations. The spirit is centered, poised mid-motion, surrounded by geometric floral patterns and glowing firefly-like motes of light. Composition should be high-contrast, with deep sapphire blues and emerald greens punctuated by warm golden glows, giving it a magical, celestial feel. The style is clean, crisp vector art merged with ornate stained-glass etching aesthetics, designed to be highly visible and impactful when printed on clothing. Minimalist background negative space to ensure central subject pop. Silhouette must be strong and legible.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, low resolution, grainy, low contrast, clutter, realistic photo, photorealism
